title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.700 - Arthritis program established — purpose
text:
192.700.  Arthritis program established — purpose. — There is hereby established a state arthritis program.  The board and the committee established by sections 192.700 to 192.727 are to administer state, federal and private grants and programs dealing with arthritis and related diseases as a part of this arthritis program.  Regional arthritis centers established pursuant to sections 192.700 to 192.727 constitute part of the state arthritis program.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1028 § 2)
